languages.original_text: "Another tin can on board. My little whispers say this one is far more interesting than the old one, but they all look the same to me."

languages.text: "Еще одна жестянка на борту. Шепотки говорят, что эта заметно любопытнее старой, но по мне так они все на одно лицо".
"Another tin can on board. My little whispers say this one is far more interesting than the old one, but they all look the same to me."
languages.original_text: "Еще одна жестянка на борту. Шепотки говорят, что эта заметно любопытнее старой, но по мне так они все на одно лицо".

traits.locale_text: "Another tin can on board. My little whispers say this one is far more interesting than the old one, but they all look the same to me."
"Another tin can on board. My little whispers say this one is far more interesting than the old one, but they all look the same to me."
"Another tin can on board. My little whispers say this one is far more interesting than the old one, but they all look the same to me."

languages.text: 「もう1つの缶が船に搭載された。私のささやきによると、この缶は前の缶よりもはるかに興味深い。でも、私にはどれも同じに見える」
languages.original_text: "Another tin can on board. My little whispers say this one is far more interesting than the old one, but they all look the same to me."

traits.locale_text: 「もう1つの缶が船に搭載された。私のささやきによると、この缶は前の缶よりもはるかに興味深い。でも、私にはどれも同じに見える。」

languages.text: « Un nouveau tas de boulons à bord. Mes petits murmures disent que celui-ci est bien plus intéressant que l'ancien, mais à mes yeux, ils se ressemblent tous. »
languages.original_text: "Another tin can on board. My little whispers say this one is far more interesting than the old one, but they all look the same to me."

traits.locale_text: « Un nouveau tas de boulons à bord. Mes petits murmures disent que celui-ci est bien plus intéressant que l'ancien, mais à mes yeux, ils se ressemblent tous. »

languages.text: "Noch eine Blechdose an Bord. Meinen Flüsterstimmen zufolge ist diese hier deutlich interessanter als die alte, aber für mich sehen sie alle gleich aus."
languages.original_text: "Another tin can on board. My little whispers say this one is far more interesting than the old one, but they all look the same to me."

traits.locale_text: "Noch eine Blechdose an Bord. Meinen Flüsterstimmen zufolge ist diese hier deutlich interessanter als die alte, aber für mich sehen sie alle gleich aus."

languages.text: "Gemideki bir başka teneke daha. Küçük fısıltılarım bunun eskisinden çok daha ilginç olduğunu söylüyor. Oysa bana hepsi aynı görünüyor."
languages.original_text: "Another tin can on board. My little whispers say this one is far more interesting than the old one, but they all look the same to me."

traits.locale_text: "Gemideki bir başka teneke daha. Küçük fısıltılarım bunun eskisinden çok daha ilginç olduğunu söylüyor. Oysa bana hepsi aynı görünüyor."

languages.text: «Otro pedazo de hojalata a bordo. Mis pequeños susurros dicen que este es mucho más interesante que el otro, pero a mí me parecen todos iguales».
languages.original_text: "Another tin can on board. My little whispers say this one is far more interesting than the old one, but they all look the same to me."

traits.locale_text: «Otro pedazo de hojalata a bordo. Mis pequeños susurros dicen que este es mucho más interesante que el otro, pero a mí me parecen todos iguales».

languages.text: “又来了一个铁罐头。那些絮絮叨叨的低语告诉我，这家伙可比之前那个有意思多了——虽然在我眼里他们都长得一个样。”
languages.original_text: "Another tin can on board. My little whispers say this one is far more interesting than the old one, but they all look the same to me."

traits.locale_text: “又来了一个铁罐头。那些絮絮叨叨的低语告诉我，这家伙可比之前那个有意思多了——虽然在我眼里他们都长得一个样。”
